executor_evidence: T05 created opt-in current-work Phase 3 coordination artifact validation test (src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts). Quality-fix passes tightened validation to parse the actual plan.md strict-completion matrix table (exactly 11 approved numbered criteria rows, canonical statuses only, no extra criteria), added table-driven ownership coverage checks for every minimum T05 plan target (mailbox/ledger shared_append, read-only spec/evidence/plan, orchestrator-owned state/final-review, sequenced ownership.json, verification records T00-T06, helper/test/skill artifacts), and strengthened verification evidence validation to fail uncovered/conflict changed_files entries, missing actual_changed_files coverage, missing ownership_entry_id, unresolved ownership_entry_id, target mismatch between changed_files[].path and cited ownership entry target, invalid ownership entry status, and ownership operation mismatches against registry allowed_operations. Test skips when WORK_ID is unset so normal bun test remains stable. Validated/finalized ownership.json (43 entries, all pass OwnershipRegistrySchema) and mailbox.jsonl (18 records after T05 quality-fix append, all pass MailboxMessageSchema). Both artifacts created by T00 were already schema-compliant after T02 implemented schemas; no ownership.json structural changes were needed.

diagnostics_status.summary: T05 creates/updates a test file and JSON/JSONL artifacts only; no production TypeScript code changes. typecheck will be run separately as the static analysis gate because the LSP server for .ts was unavailable in this environment.
